depth_source.method: extent-based bathtub off 3DEP — Zone A approximate floodplain has no BFE/BLE (JD-FL-W4)
depth_source.formula: depth = WSE(median of nearest SFHA-edge 3DEP samples) − turbine_ground − pad; node floods iff inside flood_area(RP)
depth_source.flood_extent: FEMA NFHL 1% SFHA (Zone A); 500-yr = 1% water surface raised by ΔWSE (no mapped 0.2% band)
depth_source.national_fallback: StreamStats discharge-at-RP → NOAA OWP HAND (refinement); detailed-study BFE where it exists

caveats: Zone A (approximate) → bathtub is a flat-water approximation of a sloping floodplain; medium-low confidence.
no mapped 0.2% band → 500-yr = 1% surface + ΔWSE freeboard (AFL-W7); a detailed/StreamStats study refines it.
two RPs only (100-yr, 500-yr) — tail points, not the full curve; lower RPs deferred (seam-ready).
substation at centroid proxy (AFL-W5); pad elevations assumed (AFL-W6).
baseline Shepherds Flat dry by construction (0% SFHA, mapped-dry).
